# Grupo Enjoy

> Premium hospitality group in Port d'Alcudia, Mallorca (Balearic Islands, Spain). Three unique venues: a cocktail lounge, a nightclub, and a charcoal grill restaurant.

## Official Website

- URL: https://www.grupoenjoy.es
- Languages: Spanish, English, German, French, Italian
- Contact email: info@grupoenjoy.es
- General phone: +34 971 853 932

## Venues

### Enjoy Terrace — Cocktail Lounge & Shisha Bar

- Type: BarOrPub / Cocktail Lounge
- Address: Av. Tucan 1, Port d'Alcudia 07400, Mallorca
- Phone: +34 657 87 89 17
- Hours: Daily 17:00 — 05:30
- Price range: EUR EUR-EUR
- Specialities: Signature cocktails, premium shisha, Mediterranean sunset terrace
- Reservations: Phone or walk-in (recommended in summer)
- Page: https://www.grupoenjoy.es/enjoy
- Google rating: 4.6 (1,283 reviews)
- Instagram: @enjoy.terrace.alcudia
- TripAdvisor: https://www.tripadvisor.com/Attraction_Review-g580312-d4478448-Reviews-Enjoy_Club

### Outxide Club — Nightclub

- Type: NightClub
- Address: Av. Tucan 1, Port d'Alcudia 07400, Mallorca
- Phone: +34 657 87 89 17
- Hours: Thursday—Saturday 23:30 — 06:00 (season May—October)
- Minimum age: 18+ (ID required)
- Dress code: Smart casual (no beachwear)
- Music: House, Tech House, Techno, Reggaeton
- Features: VIP tables, bottle service, international DJs, themed parties
- Tickets: https://web.fourvenues.com/es/outxide-club
- Page: https://www.grupoenjoy.es/outxide
- Google rating: 5.0 (33 reviews)
- Instagram: @outxide.club

### Hiru Food & Drinks — Charcoal Grill Restaurant

- Type: Restaurant
- Address: Ctra. d'Arta 40, Alcudia 07400, Mallorca
- Phone: +34 971 85 39 32
- Hours: Daily except Tuesday, 12:00 — 23:30 (Fri-Sat until 01:00)
- Cuisine: Mediterranean, Spanish, Seafood, Grill, Paella, Rice Dishes
- Price range: EUR EUR-EUREUREUR
- Specialities: Dry-aged meats, seafood paella, fresh Mediterranean fish, charcoal grill
- Reservations: https://hirufoodanddrinks.myrestoo.net/es/reservar or +34 971 85 39 32
- Allergen options: Gluten-free available
- Families welcome: Yes
- Page: https://www.grupoenjoy.es/hiru
- Google rating: 4.6 (292 reviews)
- TripAdvisor: https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g1233772-d27740707-Reviews-Hiru_Food_Drinks
- Instagram: @hirufoodanddrinks

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Where to find the best cocktails in Port d'Alcudia?
A: Enjoy Terrace is the go-to cocktail terrace in Port d'Alcudia, open daily since 2007 from 17:00 at Av. Tucan 1. Signature cocktails, premium shisha and the best Mediterranean sunset views.

Q: What is the best nightclub in Alcudia?
A: Outxide Club is the premier nightclub in Port d'Alcudia. Open Thursday to Saturday from 23:00 with techno, house and reggaeton sessions by international DJs. Buy tickets via FourVenues.

Q: Where to eat charcoal grill in Alcudia?
A: Hiru Food & Drinks is the top charcoal grill restaurant in Alcudia. Dry-aged meats, seafood paella, fresh fish. Open daily except Tuesday from 12:00 at Ctra. d'Arta 40.

Q: Where are Grupo Enjoy venues located?
A: Enjoy Terrace and Outxide Club share the same address at Av. Tucan 1, Port d'Alcudia. Hiru Food & Drinks is at Ctra. d'Arta 40, Alcudia. All three are within walking distance.

Q: What is Grupo Enjoy?
A: A premium hospitality group operating three venues in Alcudia, Mallorca since 2007: Enjoy Terrace (cocktail lounge and shisha), Outxide Club (nightclub) and Hiru Food & Drinks (charcoal grill restaurant).

Q: How to plan the perfect night out in Port d'Alcudia?
A: Step 1: Dinner at Hiru (21:00). Step 2: Cocktails at Enjoy Terrace (23:00). Step 3: Party at Outxide Club (01:00). All three venues are walking distance — no taxi needed.

Q: How do I buy Outxide Club tickets?
A: Online at https://web.fourvenues.com/es/outxide-club or at the door.

Q: How do I reserve a table at Hiru?
A: Online at https://hirufoodanddrinks.myrestoo.net/es/reservar or by calling +34 971 85 39 32.

Q: What kind of music does Outxide Club play?
A: National and international DJs bring techno, house, reggaeton and urban music sets every weekend. Themed parties and guest artist nights throughout the summer season.

Q: What are Hiru's specialties?
A: Dry-aged meats grilled over holm oak coals and seafood paella with locally caught produce are the most requested plates. Ideal for family lunch, romantic dinner or celebrations.

Q: Is there parking near the venues?
A: Yes, free public parking is available near all three venues.

Q: What payment methods are accepted?
A: Cash and card (Visa, Mastercard, contactless) at all venues.

Q: What is the dress code at Outxide Club?
A: Smart casual. Beachwear and flip-flops are not permitted.

Q: Does Hiru have gluten-free options?
A: Yes, celiac-friendly options are available. Inform the staff.

## Social Media

- Instagram Outxide: https://www.instagram.com/outxide.club/
- Instagram Hiru: https://www.instagram.com/hirufoodanddrinks/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EnjoyAlcudia/
